tools.name: list_systems
tools.description: List all classification systems (NAICS, ISIC, ICD, etc).

tools.name: get_system
tools.description: Get metadata and root nodes for a classification system.

tools.name: get_node
tools.description: Get full detail for a single code in a system.

tools.name: get_children
tools.description: List direct children of a code in the hierarchy.

tools.name: get_ancestors
tools.description: Get the ancestry chain from root to this code.

tools.name: get_equivalences
tools.description: Return all crosswalk edges for a code (its equivalents in every connected system).

tools.name: search
tools.description: Full-text search over node titles, optionally scoped to one system.

tools.name: classify
tools.description: Classify a free-text business, product, occupation, or document under standard codes across all systems.

tools.name: coverage_stats
tools.description: Edge counts between every pair of systems (crosswalk matrix).
